stemHtml: How are Prohibited (P), Restricted (R), and Danger (D) areas identified?

options.a: By the state/territory location indicator, followed by the letter P, R, or D, followed by identification figures.
options.b: By the state/territory location indicator followed by all three letters P, R, and D.
options.c: By the letters P, R, or D followed by identification figures only.
options.d: By the letters P, R, and D followed by identification figures.
